title: Expose version-matched integration guidance
description: Expose version-matched provider-neutral integration guidance and optional agent skills that use only the public CLI contract. Implements G5 and UC-LEDGER-006 under C7 without making any agent host a runtime dependency.
rationale: Bundled automation is part of the product contract and must not drift into private storage coupling.
story_want: install compatible Tally skills with the executable
story_so_that: AI agents can use Ledger commands safely without bespoke prompting
acceptance_criteria: Given only the executable and its discovered schemas, when Hermes or another external orchestrator integrates with Ledger, then every public workflow is usable without installing an agent-specific skill or accessing private storage.

Given a supported optional agent host, when Ledger integration guidance or a skill is installed, then its instructions and declared contract version are available without copying private database files, implementation APIs, or provider-specific transport semantics.
Given guidance or a skill and executable with compatible declared contract versions, when a Ledger workflow is invoked, then only discoverable provider-neutral public operations and schemas are used.
Given an incompatible declared contract version, when execution is attempted, then compatibility fails before any Ledger mutation and returns a stable module-scoped error.
Given a breaking public contract change, when a release is produced, then the contract version changes and all bundled guidance or skills declare compatibility with that version.
